member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController
member.summary: API controller for the JellySeerr-style media request system.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.GetRequests(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns all media requests (admin sees all, users see own).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.SubmitRequest(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest)
member.summary: Submits a new media request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status of a request. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.DeleteRequest(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a request. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.Search(System.String)
member.summary: Searches TMDb for movies and TV shows.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.NowPlaying
member.summary: Returns currently in-theaters (Released) movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.Upcoming
member.summary: Returns upcoming (Coming Soon) movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.PopularMovies
member.summary: Returns popular movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.PopularTv
member.summary: Returns popular TV shows.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController
member.summary: API controller for the statistics and analytics dashboard.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserManager,MediaBrowser.Model.Activity.IActivityManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetOverview
member.summary: Returns a high-level overview (active sessions, user count, total events).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetUserStats
member.summary: Returns per-user watch statistics. Admin access only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetHeatmap
member.summary: Returns a 7-element array (Sun–Sat) of play-event counts.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetLiveSessions
member.summary: Returns all currently active playback sessions.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController
member.summary: API controller for chunked file uploads.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.InitSession(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest)
member.summary: Initializes a new chunked upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.UploadChunk(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Uploads a single chunk for an existing session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.CompleteSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks an upload session as complete.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.CancelSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels an upload session and removes the temporary file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.GetStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the current status of an upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.GetConfig
member.summary: Returns the current plugin upload configuration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a media request.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Pending
member.summary: Pending admin review.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Approved
member.summary: Approved and being sourced.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Available
member.summary: Media has been added to the library.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Denied
member.summary: Request was denied.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest
member.summary: Represents a single user media request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique request ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedByUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID who submitted the request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedByUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the user who submitted the request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.TmdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDb ID (if available).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.ImdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the IMDB ID (if available).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title of the requested media.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Year
member.summary: Gets or sets the year of the media.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.MediaType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media type (movie, tv, etc.).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.PosterUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the poster image URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Overview
member.summary: Gets or sets a short synopsis/overview.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the current request status.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.AdminNote
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional admin note.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the request was submitted.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the status was last updated.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.UserNote
member.summary: Gets or sets optional user notes.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession
member.summary: Tracks the state of an in-progress chunked upload.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique session ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the original file name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TotalSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the total file size in bytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ChunkSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the chunk size in bytes used for this session.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TotalChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of chunks expected.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ReceivedChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the set of chunk indexes that have been received.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.BytesWritten
member.summary: Gets or sets the bytes written so far.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TempFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the temporary file path on the server.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this session was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.LastActivityAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this session last received data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.IsComplete
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the upload is complete.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ProgressPercent
member.summary: Gets the completion percentage.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest
member.summary: DTO for initiating a new upload session.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the file name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest.TotalSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the total file size in bytes.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse
member.summary: Response DTO returned when a session is created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the session ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.ChunkSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the chunk size clients should use (bytes).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.TotalChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of chunks.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin
member.summary: The main Jellyfin AIO plugin class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.UploadService
member.summary: Gets the upload service singleton.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.MediaRequestService
member.summary: Gets the media-request service singleton.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for Jellyfin AIO.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MediaUploadPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute path on the server where uploaded files are saved.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MaxUploadSizeMb
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed upload size in megabytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.ChunkSizeMb
member.summary: Gets or sets the chunk size for chunked uploads in megabytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.TmdbApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDb (The Movie Database) API key for media discovery.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.RequireRequestApproval
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the request system requires approval before being fulfilled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.PublicStatistics
member.summary: Gets or sets whether anonymous (unauthenticated) users can view the statistics dashboard.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService
member.summary: Manages media requests and TMDb/IMDb discovery.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a null logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a provided logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all requests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetByUser(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns requests for a specific user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.AddRequest(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest)
member.summary: Adds a new request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status of a request (admin action).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.DeleteRequest(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.SearchAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches TMDb for movies and TV shows.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetNowPlayingAsync
member.summary: Gets currently in-theaters movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetUpcomingAsync
member.summary: Gets upcoming movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetPopularMoviesAsync
member.summary: Gets popular movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetPopularTvAsync
member.summary: Gets popular TV shows.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService
member.summary: Aggregates watch and network statistics from Jellyfin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserManager,MediaBrowser.Model.Activity.IActivityManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetActiveSessions
member.summary: Returns a list of currently active playback sessions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetUserStatsAsync
member.summary: Returns a summary of all users with their aggregate play-event count. Fetches all user-attributed activity once, then groups in memory.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetWeekdayHeatmapAsync
member.summary: Returns a per-weekday breakdown of play events (index 0 = Sunday).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetOverviewAsync
member.summary: Returns a simple overview object with top-level counters.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService
member.summary: Manages chunked file upload sessions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a null logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a provided logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CreateSession(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.WriteChunkAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Writes a chunk to the session's temp file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CompleteSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks a session as complete.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CancelSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels and cleans up a session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.GetSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a session by ID.
